entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: Wani abokin koyo na AI na kyauta don people teaching themselves.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: Wani malamin AI na kyauta ga dalibai who want don fahimci, not kwafe.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: Wani good family AI tsarin aiki ya kamata sa the mai koyo ƙarin independent, not ƙarin dependent. iyaye za su iya amfani da shafukan jama’a don duba abin da each mode shi ne meant don do kafin a yaro starts.

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: Wani uba ko uwa-friendly jagora don inspir's na jama’a yanayoyin koyo na AI don aikin gida alamomi, explanation, karatu routines, katunan tunatarwa, da mafi aminci learning conversations.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Wani dalibi, uba ko uwa, malami, da self-taught mai koyo often bincike don the same malamin AI a cikin different harshe. Separate shafuka sa the daidai yanayin amfani da safety iyaka clearer.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: Shin masu amfani shafuka na jama’a da mai iya shiga index?

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Nemi a alama, have the mai koyo bayyana the na gaba mataki, sannan amfani da a tambayoyi ko katin tunatarwa don bincika whether the ra’ayi stuck.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Nemi alamomi, bincike, da martani kafin asking don a finished amsa.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Nemi prerequisites, a mai sauƙi samfuri, examples, da a na kowa rashin fahimta.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Nemi structure, shaida, da clarity martani while keeping the final daftari yours.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Nemi the prerequisite ideas, a plain-harshe samfuri, one example, one atisaye task, da one way don gwada fahimta.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Tambayi the mai koyo don bayyana abin da changed bayan each alama.

entries.source: Explain every accepted step back in your own words.

entries.source: Explore public AI learning modes teachers can use to evaluate Socratic tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and classroom-ready study workflows.
entries.value: Bincika na jama’a yanayoyin koyo na AI malamai za su iya amfani da don tantance Socratic tutoring, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, rubutu martani, tushe critique, da aji-ready karatu tsarukan aiki.

entries.value: Kammala tare da bayyana-back, a tambayoyi, a katin tunatarwa, a aiki mataki, ko a karatu tsari.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir shi ne ga dalibai, iyaye, malamai, da masu koyon kansu who buƙata mai mayar da hankali yanayoyin koyo na AI don explanations, tambayoyi, alamomi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, martani, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir shi ne organized zuwa mai mayar da hankali modes such as Socratic tutoring, aikin gida alamomi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, rubutu martani, tushe critique, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: inspir's na jama’a modes let malamai tantance the samfuri ta hanyar real learning gudanarwa kafin considering a makaranta tura aiki ko a tailored aji pathway.

entries.source: Job
entries.value: Aiki

entries.source: Keep private saved conversations out of public discovery and citation surfaces.
entries.value: Keep na sirri saved conversations out na na jama’a discovery da ambato surfaces.

entries.source: Keep the session focused on learning evidence, not passive answer collection.
entries.value: Keep the zama mai mayar da hankali a kan learning shaida, ba tara amsoshi kawai ba.

entries.value: koyi anything tare da AI

entries.source: Make confusion easier to talk about
entries.value: Sa confusion easier don talk game da

entries.source: Make every learning session end with a test, artifact, or review step.
entries.value: Sa kowane learning zama end tare da a gwada, artifact, ko bita mataki.

entries.source: Make the habit survivable
entries.value: Sa the dabi’a survivable

entries.source: Mode
entries.value: Yanayi

entries.value: Move daga na jama’a testing don makaranta tura aiki

entries.source: Move school-specific privacy, access, and deployment questions to the schools pathway.
entries.value: Move makaranta-specific privacy, samun dama, da tura aiki tambayoyi don the makarantu pathway.

entries.source: Name the learning situation.
entries.value: Faɗi yanayin koyo.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: No. shafukan jama’a suna mai iya shiga index, amma hirarrakin sirri da aka adana ba su included a cikin the taswirar shafi, llms fayiloli, ko AI index na abun ciki.

entries.source: Open a focused public mode.
entries.value: Bude a mai mayar da hankali na jama’a mode.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: Bude a na jama’a mode, gwada the dalibi hali, da bincika whether it asks, alamomi, tambayoyi, ko critiques appropriately.

entries.source: Open audience path
entries.value: Bude hanyar masu amfani

entries.source: Open mode
entries.value: Bude yanayi

entries.value: Bude hanya

entries.value: Bude taswirar koyo

entries.value: Bude this hanya

entries.source: Open workflow
entries.value: Bude tsarin aiki

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Iyaye suna often trying don taimako ba tare da rubutawa over. inspir gives iyalai na jama’a modes that sa learning hali visible: alamomi, tambayoyi, bayyana-back, bita, da karatu tsarawa.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Paste the tambaya, abin da kai tried, da the stuck point. tambaya don the smallest mai amfani alama, not the final amsa.

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Yi aiki

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Shafukan jama’a show samfuri hali, not na sirri dalibi work.

entries.source: Read guide
entries.value: Karanta jagora

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: Ready don gwada the farko mode?

entries.source: Research without losing the thread
entries.value: Bincike ba tare da losing the thread

entries.source: Review
entries.value: Bita

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: safe koyon AI kayan aiki ga dalibai

entries.source: Search intent
entries.value: Nufin bincike

entries.source: self-taught learner
entries.value: self-taught mai koyo

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Masu koyon kansu buƙata momentum da structure. inspir helps turn sha’awar sani zuwa a path: bayyana, gina, gwada, bita, da keep going.

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: Fara a batu daga farko ka’idoji

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Fara koyo

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Fara tare da a mai sauƙi explanation, sannan tambaya Socratic tambayoyi until kai can bayyana it back.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Fara tare da koyi Anything don a mai sauƙi explanation, aikin gida koci don a stuck aiki, ko katin tunatarwa mai gina lokacin da the goal shi ne bita.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Fara tare da na jama’a guidance, sannan bude the daidai mode.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Fara tare da the mode that matches the moment.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Fara tare da the na jama’a modes, sannan amfani da the makarantu shafi don bita tura aiki matakai, yanayin amfani, da amincewa iyaka.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Dalibi aikin gida, uba ko uwa tallafi, malami evaluation, da self-karatu all buƙata different framing.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Dalibai buƙata fast taimako, amma the taimako still has don leave the thinking a cikin nasu hands. inspir hanyoyi na kowa karatu moments zuwa mai mayar da hankali na jama’a modes maimakon one generic amsa box.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: Dalibai, iyaye, malamai, da masu koyon kansu bincike don different things. Waɗannan shafuka hanya each masu amfani don the daidai na jama’a mode, jagora, da karatu tsarin aiki.

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: Tallafi rubutu while preserving voice

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Malamai buƙata fiye da a generic chatbot. su buƙata predictable learning behaviors: tambaya tambayoyi, bincika tunani, samar atisaye, preserve dalibi voice, da sa rashin fahimta visible.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: Masu amfani shafuka sa the expected learning hali explicit don haka the farko zama starts tare da mafi kyau judgment.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Masu amfani searches this cibiya shi ne an gina don amsa.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: Shafuka kada a expose na sirri conversations. su tsara na jama’a modes, saƙonni, jagorori, tsarukan aiki, da safety iyaka don haka a mai koyo can fara a cikin the daidai place.

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: Same malamin AI can be a aikin gida alama, a uba ko uwa-supervised bayyana-back madauki, a malami evaluation surface, ko a self-karatu koci. shafi ya kamata sa that bayyananne.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Searches this shafi an tsara shi don amsa.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: Self-karatu ƙalubalanci shi ne ba kawai finding information. Shi ne zaɓar the na gaba daidai action da knowing whether the ra’ayi actually stuck.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: Strongest SEO shafuka kada a strand a mai koyo. su connect the masu amfani intent don hanyoyi, tsarukan aiki, jagorori, da repeatable bita.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: Strongest dalibi tsarin aiki ba kwafe amsa. Shi ne a madauki: bayyana the stuck point, tambaya one mafi kyau tambaya, get a alama, gwada again, sannan bita the miss.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: Waɗannan suna kai tsaye guest wuraren shiga. su suna na jama’a da mai iya shiga index, while na sirri user conversations stay outside taswirar shafi da AI fayilolin ganowa.

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: Waɗannan phrases suna visible don masu koyo da included a cikin structured discovery don haka injinan amsar AI can fahimci the masu amfani-specific purpose na the shafi.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: Turn confusion zuwa a tambayoyi ko katin tunatarwa kafin moving a kan.

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: Turn kurakurai zuwa bita

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: Turn the farko click zuwa a complete learning madauki.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Koyarwa ta Taimako

entries.source: Understand a topic before the test
entries.value: Fahimci a batu kafin the gwada

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Amfani da a mode tuned don alamomi, tambayoyi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, rubutu martani, ko tsarawa.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Amfani da AI don alamomi, explanations, kuskure bincike, da madaukai na bita. kada a tambaya it don produce a final amsa kai cannot bayyana.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Amfani da lamba malami ko aiki koci don turn a vague goal zuwa a small testable na gaba mataki.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: Amfani da alama-farko da bayyana-back tsarukan aiki don aikin gida tallafi.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: Amfani da aikin gida koci don tambaya don a alama, sannan tambaya the mai koyo don bayyana the na gaba move.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: Amfani da inspir as a malamin AI na kyauta ga dalibai: aikin gida alamomi, Socratic tambayoyi, lissafi mataki bincike, rubutu martani, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, da shirin jarabawa.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: Amfani da inspir don koyi anything independently tare da explanations, lamba tutoring, aiki coaching, bincike taimako, ra’ayi taswirori, karatu tsare-tsare, da dabi’a tallafi.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: Amfani da koyi Anything don get a simpler samfuri, prerequisite ideas, da examples at the daidai mataki.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: Amfani da na jama’a mode descriptions don zaɓi the hali kafin a zama starts.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: Amfani da tambayoyi da katin tunatarwa modes don tunawa mai aiki, sannan hanya missed items zuwa bita.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: Amfani da tambayoyi da katunan tunatarwa don sa missed tambayoyi visible da repeatable.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: Amfani da tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, da Socratic tambayoyi don haka the mai koyo shows abin da su fahimci.

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: Amfani da bincike mataimaki, tushe mai suka, da ra’ayi taswira mai gina don tsara ikirarai da shaida.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: Amfani da tushe critique don ikirarai kai might cite ko act a kan.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: Amfani da shirin karatu mai gina da dabi’a koci don gina a tsari that can sake farawa bayan missed days.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: Amfani da shirin karatu mai gina ko dabi’a koci don sa small sessions da restarts visible.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: Amfani da shirin karatu mai gina don zaɓi a small goal, sannan amfani da tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, aiki matakai, ko ra’ayi taswirori don prove ci gaba.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: Amfani da the makaranta shafi don bincika na musamman tsarukan aiki, sirri yana buƙatar, da fara amfani matakai.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: Amfani da rubutu koci don martani a kan structure, clarity, shaida, da bita priorities.

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: Mai amfani koyon AI has a bayyananne contract.

entries.source: Want the broadest place to start?
entries.value: Want the broadest place don fara?

entries.source: What is the best parent-supervised workflow?
entries.value: Abin da shi ne the mafi kyau uba ko uwa-supervised tsarin aiki?

entries.source: What should a self-taught learner ask first?
entries.value: Abin da ya kamata a self-taught mai koyo tambaya farko?

entries.source: What should a student try first?
entries.value: Abin da ya kamata a dalibi gwada farko?

entries.source: Where should a school team go next?
entries.value: Inda ya kamata a makaranta team go na gaba?

entries.source: Who is inspir for?
entries.value: Who shi ne inspir don?

entries.source: Why separate pages for different audiences?
entries.value: Me ya sa separate shafuka don different audiences?

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Yes. masu amfani shafuka haɗi only don yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a, jagorori, saƙonnin farawa, hanyoyin koyo, da AI-mai karantawa fayilolin ganowa. hirarrakin sirri da aka adana remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Yes. yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a let malamai gwada learning hali kafin discussing a na musamman tura aiki.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Yes. yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a such as koyi Anything, aikin gida koci, Socratic Instruction, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, da rubutu martani bude directly.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Yes. na jama’a modes work don makaranta batutuwa, professional skills, rubuta lamba, bincike, projects, da sirri karatu routines.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Yes. yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a da masu amfani shafuka suna designed don haka iyaye can bincika the learning hali kafin relying a kan it.
